data.title: Cryptocurrency market trends report predicts market to reach $11.07 billion by 2035 with CAGR of 11.54% - ResearchAndMarkets.
data.description: A report on the cryptocurrency market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market is currently worth USD 3.33 billion and is estimated to reach USD 11.07 billion by 2035. It is expected to grow at a CAGR of 11.54% during this period. The report covers various aspects such as the distribution by type of technology, area of application, type of custody solution, type of cryptocurrency, type of component, type of experience level, and geographical regions.

data.title: Global Emotion AI Market to grow from $5.7B in 2023 to $38.5B by 2035 at a CAGR of 20.9%, driven by key players like Microsoft, IBM, Google, Cogito, and Realeyes.
data.description: In Dublin, the Emotion AI Market is expected to see substantial growth, with projections indicating an increase from USD 5.7 billion in 2023 to USD 38.5 billion by 2035, representing a CAGR of 20.9%. The report, now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, analyzes the market based on components, types of emotion AI, technologies, applications, and geographical regions. The findings provide valuable insights into the industry's trends and global forecasts.

data.title: Andy Anavi, Senior VP of Fintech Services at Mercado Libre, discusses Mercado Pago's ambitions and competitive advantages.
data.description: Mercado Libre, the top e-commerce and fintech platform in Latin America, unveiled the latest episode of its Investor Relations podcast series, "Inside Mercado Libre," titled "Fintech Services with Andy Anavi." Hosted by Richard Cathcart, Director of Investor Relations, and featuring Andy Anavi, Senior VP of Fintech Services, the episode delves into the strategic progression and expansion prospects of Mercado Pago. The discussion spotlights Mercado Pago's evolution and growth avenues in the fintech realm.

data.title: Teledyne delivered 4 GAVIA AUV systems to Swedish Defence; part of multi-year agreement for fleet modernization.
data.description: Teledyne Gavia, a segment of Teledyne Technologies Incorporated and renowned for its modular autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs), disclosed sending the initial batch of four GAVIA AUV systems to the Swedish Defence Materiel Administration (FMV). This delivery aligns with a broader agreement spanning multiple years between Teledyne Marine and FMV. As per the agreement, these GAVIA AUVs will aid in bolstering fleet modernization endeavors for the Swedish Defense, emphasizing Teledyne's key role in driving advancements in maritime technology.

data.title: Inventor creates pet accessory FUR LOCKS as an alternative to traditional bows for dogs and cats (ADA-2053).
data.description: In Pittsburgh, on January 28, 2026, an inventor from Orange Park, Florida shared their inspiration behind creating FUR LOCKS, a new and stylish option for pet bows and accessories. The inventor aimed to offer a fun alternative for pet owners and introduce more joy to the lives of dogs and cats. The innovation is poised to bring a new flair to the pet accessory market, with its unique design promising to put smiles on the faces of pet owners.

data.title: Ember partners with Ascend at Lake Powell in Page, AZ offering co-ownership in resort townhomes with on-site management. Luxurious vacation options await.
data.description: A newly established resort townhome community is now offering co-ownership opportunities through Ember, along with on-site management services provided by Ember Stays. This community is situated in PAGE, Arizona, which is recognized as one of the top recreation destinations in the Southwest. Ember, a renowned provider in the realm of luxury vacation home co-ownership and management, announced this development on January 28, 2026.

With generous land space and lush surroundings, residents can create their dream living space. Experience upscale living with these sought-after properties, offering a unique opportunity to live in one of Raleigh's most serene neighborhoods. Don't miss out on the chance to be a part of this exclusive community. Limited number of home sites available, act fast to secure your slice of paradise.

data.title: Teva's Q4 2025 revenue hits $4.71B, beating expectations, key brands reach $1B in sales milestone. Austedo's sales up 34% to $2.26B.
data.description: In its fourth-quarter 2025 financial report, Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. (NYSE: TEVA) announced total revenue of $4.71 billion, exceeding analysts' expectations of $4.37 billion. This marks an 11% increase year-over-year in U.S. dollars or 9% in local currency. The revenue growth was fueled by development milestone payments related to Phase 3 studies for duvakitug (anti-TL1A) and higher revenues from key innovative products. However, this was partially offset by reduced proceeds from selling certain product rights and lower revenues from the International Markets segment due to the divestment of a venture in Japan. Notably, the company highlighted that the fourth quarter of 2025 saw key brands generating around $1 billion in revenues collectively. Sales of Austedo (Huntington's disease drug) in 2025 surged by 34% to $2.26 billion, outperforming expectations.

data.title: USA Cares to host 2026 TPC Las Vegas Golf Tournament on March 2, aiming to support veterans and service members.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, in Louisville, Kentucky, USA Cares announced the 2026 TPC Las Vegas Golf Tournament scheduled for Monday, March 2, 2026. The event aims to unite supporters nationwide for a top-tier golf event that will raise funds for veterans, service members, and their families. The tournament is being presented by...

data.title: CTS Corporation to release fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 earnings, and conduct conference call.
data.description: CTS Corporation has set the date for the announcement of their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company will release these figures and host a conference call on the designated date to discuss their performance during that time period. Shareholders and analysts are encouraged to participate in the call to gain insights into the company's numbers and future outlook. This announcement signifies an important event for the company and stakeholders as they review the financial highlights and achievements for the specified period.

data.title: ADP beats revenue estimates in Q2 2026, reporting $5.36 billion, 6% YoY growth. EPS at $2.62, exceeding estimates.
data.description: Automatic Data Processing Inc. (NASDAQ: ADP) released their Q2 fiscal 2026 results, surpassing expectations. Quarterly revenues reached $5.36 billion, a 6% increase year-over-year, beating the estimated $5.34 billion. The company reported an adjusted EPS of $2.62 for the quarter, also surpassing estimates of $2.58. ADP primarily generates income through service fees in its Employer Services and PEO segments. Employer Services revenues grew by 6% to $3.61 billion, while PEO Services revenues increased by 6% to $1.76 billion. Adjusted EBIT saw a 10% rise. For a detailed read, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Inventor creates portable diaper changing station for outdoor use, based in West Seneca, N.Y. - ACC-463.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 28, 2026, an inventor from West Seneca, New York, shared the inspiration behind creating a new baby changing station suitable for outdoor venues. The inventor expressed a need for an improved facility at places such as large carnivals, leading to the development of the PORTABLE DIAPER CHANGING STATION. This innovation provides a private enclosed area for changing diapers and is designed to be easily transportable.

data.title: The Reading League adds six new state chapters in 2026, reaching milestone of 10 years with growth.
data.description: In a recent announcement dated January 28, 2026, The Reading League (TRL) revealed the launch of six additional state chapters in Arizona, Arkansas, Hawai'i, Mississippi, Nebraska, and North Dakota. This move aims to bolster the organization's nationwide presence and enhance its network. The new chapters are set to commence operations this month, marking a significant expansion for TRL.

data.title: Razor Tracking integrates with John Deere Operations Center™ for seamless alignment of construction fleet.
data.description: Razor Tracking has recently announced its integration with John Deere Operations Center™ in order to streamline the coordination of agriculture and construction machinery on a singular platform. This development, disclosed on January 28, 2026, in Fargo, North Dakota, demonstrates the software's compatibility with John Deere Construction equipment and telematics system. The integration aims to enhance operational efficiency by combining the capabilities of both systems.

data.title: Germany's Buy Now Pay Later market is projected to reach $145.43 billion by 2031, with a 16.6% annual growth to $83.46 billion in 2026. Featuring PayPal, Klarna, RatePay, and Riverty - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
data.description: Dublin-based ResearchAndMarkets.com has introduced a report on the business and investment opportunities in the Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) sector in Germany. The report provides insights into over 90 key performance indicators (KPIs) regarding the BNPL market in Germany, including market size, end-use sectors, market share, product analysis, business model, and demographics. The BNPL payment market in Germany is projected to exhibit a 16.6% annual growth rate, reaching an estimated value of US$83.46 billion by 2026. Notably, the German BNPL market saw substantial expansion from 2022 to 2025.
